title: Lilly Unveils JAK2 Inhibitor Data from $2.3B Ajax Deal
headline: Eli Lilly presents Phase 1 data for AJ1-11095, a type II JAK2 inhibitor from $2.3B Ajax acquisition, showing 70% spleen volume reduction and 70% symptom response in pretreated myelofibrosis patients at EHA 2026.
key_facts: $2.3B Ajax Therapeutics deal; AJ1-11095 Phase 1 AJX-101 study (Abstract S218); 23 patients across 5 dose levels (25-125 mg daily); SVR35 70% (16/23 patients) vs. historical 0-32%; TSS50 70% week 12, 65% week 24; 59% had ≥20% VAF reduction by week 24, 35% had ≥50% reduction
mentioned_companies: Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai

title: J&J Talvey + Darzalex Combo Dominates Myeloma Trial
headline: Johnson & Johnson presents Phase 3 MonumenTAL-3 data showing Talvey plus Darzalex Faspro achieves 81.3% PFS vs. 51.2% standard of care in earlier-line relapsed/refractory multiple myeloma at EHA 2026.
key_facts: MonumenTAL-3 Phase 3 trial; Talvey (talquetamab-tgvs) + Darzalex Faspro (daratumumab and hyaluronidase-fihj); PFS 81.3% vs. 51.2% comparator; OS 89.2% vs. standard of care; ≥1 prior line population; J&J presented 30+ abstracts at EHA 2026

title: AbbVie Presents Venetoclax CLL Data at EHA 2026
headline: AbbVie announces new Phase 3 fixed-duration venetoclax-based combination data at EHA 2026 Congress in Stockholm (CLL14 study context).
key_facts: Phase 3 fixed-duration venetoclax-based combination; CLL14 study; presented EHA 2026 June 11-14

title: Kardigan Biotech Targets $373M IPO at $1.4B Valuation
headline: Cardiovascular biotech Kardigan sets IPO terms for $373.3 million raise targeting $1.4 billion valuation with lead asset danicamtiv for genetic dilated cardiomyopathy.
key_facts: $373.3M IPO proceeds; $1.4B valuation target; lead drug danicamtiv for genetic dilated cardiomyopathy; three-drug pipeline; 13th biotech IPO of 2026; terms set June 11

title: Parabilis Sets Record $670M Biotech IPO
headline: Parabilis Medicines prices record-setting $670 million biotech initial public offering, largest biotech IPO on record.
key_facts: $670M IPO proceeds; largest biotech IPO on record

title: Camurus Receives FDA Complete Response Letter
headline: Camurus receives CRL from FDA (June 14 breaking news; specific drug/indication not fully detailed).

title: Jazz Pharma Zepzelca Phase 3 Lung Study Fails
headline: Jazz Pharmaceuticals' Phase 3 confirmatory lung cancer study for Zepzelca fails.

title: Summit Therapeutics Withdraws $500M Share Offering
headline: Summit Therapeutics pulls $500 million share offering one day after announcement citing market conditions; drug is PD-1/VEGF cancer combination.
key_facts: $500M share offering withdrawn; PD-1/VEGF cancer drug

title: Menarini/Stemline SENTRY Trial Data in Myelofibrosis
headline: Menarini and Stemline present Phase 3 SENTRY trial data for selinexor plus ruxolitinib in myelofibrosis at EHA 2026.
key_facts: Phase 3 SENTRY trial; selinexor + ruxolitinib; myelofibrosis; presented EHA 2026

title: Merck Welireg-Keytruda Approved for Kidney Cancer
headline: FDA approves Merck's Welireg and Keytruda combination as adjuvant treatment for renal cell carcinoma.
key_facts: FDA approval; Welireg + Keytruda; kidney cancer adjuvant setting; approved June 12, 2026

title: GSK Acquires Nuvalent for $10.6B
headline: GlaxoSmithKline completes $10.6 billion acquisition of Nuvalent, marking GSK's third major buyout since late January and the sector's second-largest deal of 2026.
key_facts: $10.6B acquisition price; GSK's 3rd buyout since late January 2026; sector's 2nd-largest deal of 2026; GSK timed purchase around ASCO stock dip

title: Novo Nordisk Oral GLP-1 Gains UK Approval
headline: Novo Nordisk's oral GLP-1 therapy (Wegovy) receives UK regulatory approval; new CEO Mike Doustdar discusses Big Pharma competitive positioning.
key_facts: Oral Wegovy (semaglutide) UK approval; Novo Nordisk new CEO Mike Doustdar interview June 11

title: Shionogi Ensitrelvir PDUFA Decision Due June 16
headline: Shionogi's ensitrelvir (Xocova), a COVID-19 antiviral, has FDA PDUFA decision date of June 16, 2026; major upcoming catalyst.
key_facts: Shionogi ensitrelvir (Xocova); PDUFA date June 16, 2026; COVID-19 antiviral
